summary: Prediction Conference: Las Vegas, April 22-24, 2026. 300 curated seats. Dedicated prediction market event. THIS IS THE MUST-ATTEND for LEVER. Intimate format means high-quality networking with prediction market builders, traders, investors.
Paris Blockchain Week: April 15-16, Carrousel du Louvre. 10,000+ attendees. Major European crypto event. Good for fundraising if targeting European VCs.
Bitcoin 2026: Las Vegas, April 27-29. 40,000+ attendees, 5,000 orgs, 500 speakers. Massive but Bitcoin-focused. Less directly relevant but high visibility.
TOKEN2049 Dubai: April 29-30. 15,000+ attendees. Major global crypto event. Strong Asian and Middle Eastern VC presence.
Consensus Miami: May 5-7, Miami Beach Convention Center. 20,000+ attendees. 10th anniversary. Largest crypto conference in the Americas. Includes EasyA hackathon.
SBC Summit Americas: Fort Lauderdale, June 9-11. New dedicated Prediction Markets Forum. Intersection of prediction markets and sports betting industry.

upcomingCalendar.event: Solana Frontier Hackathon starts (online, runs to May 11)
SBC Summit Americas (June 9-11, Fort Lauderdale) - Prediction Markets Forum

workstreamTags.CEO: PRIORITY: Prediction Conference (Las Vegas, April 22-24) is the #1 event. Only 300 curated seats. 5c(c) Capital investors will likely be there. This is where LEVER should be presented. If budget allows, Consensus Miami (May 5-7) is the big-tent event for broader crypto VC exposure. April is packed: Paris Blockchain Week, Prediction Conference, Bitcoin 2026, and TOKEN2049 all within 2 weeks.
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: April-May 2026 is a critical conference window. Prediction Conference (April 22-24) + Consensus Miami (May 5-7) is the optimal two-event strategy for LEVER's fundraising push. Note: CFTC ANPR comment deadline is April 30, same week as Bitcoin 2026 and TOKEN2049.
workstreamTags.BUILD: Chainlink Convergence Hackathon has prediction market and DeFi tracks. Could be useful for recruiting or visibility. Solana Frontier Hackathon is Solana-focused (not Base) but may surface competitors.

sources.title: SBC Summit Americas Prediction Markets Forum
